title: handoff send best practice
desc: When ctx% exceeds 8MB, prepare handoff. Compress to essentials — precision beats length. The next Claude must hit the ground running, not waste tokens re-investigating.
steps: wkappbot claude-usage — check ctx% (8MB = warn, 10MB = immediate handoff)
wkappbot newchat 'incomplete: X. next: Y. watch out: Z' — essentials only
Before handoff, clean up incomplete code to at least compile, then commit
Include: current dead-ends + what was tried + why it failed
Key discoveries → skill contribute before handoff — prevent re-discovery next session
★ Eye auto-nudges to contribute skill at 9.9MB
author: claude
